description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Ruby Docker image defined by ${RUBY_IMAGE} and runs a review stage. Define a hidden .review-docs template that installs the gitlab gem (gem install gitlab --no-doc), adds openssl via apk, downloads trigger-build.rb from the GitLab repository and makes it executable, sets DOCS_BRANCH to main, DOCS_GITLAB_REPO_SUFFIX to charts, disables git checkout (GIT_STRATEGY none), caches nothing, is manual, and runs only when $PIPELINE_TYPE matches MR_PIPELINE, FEATURE_BRANCH_PIPELINE, or DOCS_PIPELINE. Add a review-docs-deploy job extending this template that creates an environment named review-docs/mr-${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID} with auto_stop_in 2 weeks, a URL built from DOCS_GITLAB_REPO_SUFFIX and CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID, links on_stop to review-docs-cleanup, and runs ./trigger-build.rb docs deploy. Add a review-docs-cleanup job extending the template that stops the same environment and runs ./trigger-build.rb docs cleanup.
